title: Deterministic restart completion routing to Telegram origin and resolved session
summary: Replace hardcoded boot restart message routing with resolved session targeting and guaranteed Telegram delivery when restart originated from Telegram. Persist restart origin metadata in lifecycle context and consume it during boot completion.

affectedFiles.description: Persist restart origin channel and Telegram response intent in PendingRestartContext and restart context creation.
Use resolved session fallback chain and send Telegram completion when restart originated from Telegram.

estimatedImpact: Restart completion acknowledgements become deterministic across UI/Telegram origins; removes missing/ambiguous post-restart confirmations for Telegram-triggered restarts.
executorPrompt:
Apply the proposal exactly as specified.
1) Edit src/gateway/lifecycle.ts:
   - Update PendingRestartContext type to add optional originChannel and respondToTelegram.
   - In gateway_restart context object creation, add originChannel: args?.channel and respondToTelegram: args?.channel === "telegram".
2) Edit src/gateway/boot.ts:
   - Update targetSession fallback chain to include process.env.SMALLCLAW_SESSION_ID before "boot-startup".
   - Ensure notifyBridge import exists (add if missing, do not duplicate).
   - Add Telegram completion send branch guarded by context?.respondToTelegram in recoverFromRestartContext after successful session message injection and before function return.
   - Keep Telegram send in try/catch with logger.warn on failure.
3) Run npm run build.
4) If build passes, report exact edits and any minor import-order/style adjustments made to satisfy lint/TS.
Do not introduce any extra behavior beyond what is specified.
